title: Seed-stage DeFi tokenomics review
prompt: We are a seed-stage Solana DeFi protocol planning a 1B supply token. Team wants 25%, investors want 20%, community gets 25%, treasury 20%, LP 10%. Review the model and propose a stronger allocation, vesting, and launch float.

title: Token-2022 transfer-fee decision
prompt: Our token should collect a 1% fee on every transfer and route it to protocol revenue. Should we use SPL Token or Token-2022, and what must we test before launch?

title: Team and investor vesting setup
prompt: Set up vesting for 4 founders, 2 seed investors, and 3 advisors. We want a transparent setup for the launch report and no accidental mainnet execution while testing.

title: New token liquidity launch
prompt: We are launching a new Solana token with unstable price discovery. Compare Meteora DLMM and Raydium CPMM, size the initial LP, and give us a launch-day sequence with lock proof.

title: Custom Anchor vesting program
prompt: We do not want Streamflow. Build a custom Anchor vesting program with cliff, linear unlock, revocation, and a security checklist.
